# INTENT

## User Request

Fix the current issues where dashboard projects cannot be opened, existing projects appear as untitled, and the new project button still fails.

## Requested Outcome

Restore the basic dashboard flow so projects open correctly and new project creation works reliably.

## Constraints

- Focus on the broken project list/detail/create flow only.
- Preserve the recently added settings and upload work where possible.
- Verification is required.

## Open Questions

- None for this bugfix slice.
